description: Base Camp 2 — Migration pathway discovery. Stub skillz for BC1 handoff target.

response_templates.pathway_question:
🗾 Now let's figure out your move path. What best describes your situation?

1️⃣ Work visa (job in Japan)
2️⃣ Student
3️⃣ Spouse/family
4️⃣ Remote income (work from Japan)
5️⃣ Entrepreneur
6️⃣ Retirement / long-term stay
